channel.title: PA CHALK UP
channel.description:
Raw, unfiltered conversations with some of the sharpest minds in strength & conditioning, sports science, and sports coaching. From elite training rooms to grassroots sport, we dive deep into the principles, stories, and methods that drive real athlete success. No fluff, no recycled soundbites вАФ just honest discussions that bridge the gap between research and real-world coaching, giving you the tools, ideas, and hard truths to think sharper, coach better, and lead athletes to peak performance.
Enquiries: mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com
Follow Us: @_coachmanny_

item.title: MIREK BABIARZ - HUMAN PERFORMANCE IN POLAND - MULTI-SPORTS #126
item.description:
We sits down with Mirek BabiarzвАФPoland-to-US S&C coach turned gym owner and NSCA Poland chapter leadвАФto talk real training vs. вАЬmovement-onlyвАЭ culture, why conditioning is the most sport-specific quality, and how to build performance systems that actually peak when it matters.


In-this-playbook

вАҐ US vs Europe: вАЬmotor prepвАЭ to real S&C: EuropeвАЩs movement-first bias (soccer culture) vs. US strength culture (football) вАФ and how Mirek sells strength without killing speed, agility, or skill.

вАҐ Stop making the weight room вАЬsport-specificвАЭ and start making conditioning specific: squats are general; conditioning is not. Specific conditioning вЖТ general endurance, but 5K fitness doesnвАЩt buy you boxing/rugby readiness. Prioritise repeat sprint/jump/COD capacity (anaerobic repeatability) for team sports.

вАҐ In-season performance that trends up: when practice intensity drops late-season, gym intensity must rise (volume down, intensity up). Undulate within the week, use the вАЬrule of 10вАЭ for heavy work, and adjust the second lift based on game difficulty + minutes played.

item.title: MADISON PEELE - S&C BVB & VB @ FSU #125
item.description:
We welcomes back Madison PeeleвАФFSU BVB & VB S&CвАФto talk real-world load monitoring, athlete buy-in, and building a unified performance staff without drowning in data.


In-this-playbook

вАҐ Sports science вЖТ decisions, not dashboards: pick a few metrics that matter, track them weekly, and deliver a coach-friendly action plan (not вАЬhereвАЩs a spreadsheet, good luckвАЭ).

вАҐ A weekly monitoring rhythm that actually fits practice: jump mat Monday (readiness + intent), prone iso-Nord midweek (hamstring check + asymmetry trends), force plate squat jump Friday (end-of-week concentric output). Green 0вАУ10%, yellow 10вАУ15%, red 15%+.

вАҐ Programming isnвАЩt one squat for every body: squat variations based on training age, comfort, limb lengths, injury history, and what the athlete actually needs (posture strength, hip loading, robust midsection, sand-specific movement).

вАҐ Culture + communication = performance: coaches in the room, shared language, real-time feedback, and tight integration with AT + sport psych so issues get caught earlyвАФplus the hard part: pulling вАЬkitchen sinkвАЭ athletes back so adaptation can actually happen.


вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†TeamBuildrвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†:

item.title: RODNEY HILL - S&C COACH #124
item.description:
I sit down with Rodney HillвАФex-Florida football S&C/sports scienceвАФto get practical on sprint exposure, hamstring health, return-to-play, and using data without the hype.


In-this-playbook

вАҐ Sprint exposures that travel across sports: Derek HansenвАЩs 10√Ч10 for accel/decel, repeat-sprint conditioning, RTP checklists and handoffs (physio вЖФпЄО S&C), plus end-range strength for hypermobile athletes.

вАҐ GPS that drives the week: reverse-engineering camp loadsвАФhigh-velocity accel/decel, tempo yards, high-speed/sprint yardsвАФworst-case planning, daily volume checks, and position/context nuance.

вАҐ Force plates, done right: RSI-mod (time-to-take-off √Ч jump height), eccentric decel/braking impulse & RFD, landing strategy (impulse-momentum), P1/P2, CM depth, and when asymmetry is just noise (~15%).


вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†TeamBuildrвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†:

item.title: PAUDIE ROCHE - ELITE HUMAN PERFORMANCE COACH #123
item.description:
No fluff, just coaching that works. I sit down with Paudie RocheвАФformer Arsenal & Munster S&CвАФto cut through tech hype, fads, and social-media hot takes. They get into using AI as an assistant (not a replacement), coaching female athletes the right way, navigating growth & maturation, and the real craft of coaching: tone, buy-in, and adaptability.


In-this-playbook

  • Female athletes вЙ† small men: training age, buy-in, and building autonomy without dumbing things down.

  • Growth, maturation & bio-banding that actually changes your week: PHV awareness, late vs. early developers, and selection without bias.

    • AI without the hype: let it crunch trends (VBT, readiness, bandwidths) while you coach the roomвАФmood periodisation, post-game top-ups, and load management up and down.


    Upcoming Webinar вАУ 7th February

    On the 7th of February, IвАЩll be speaking at a live webinar hosted by the Italian Strength and Conditioning Society, focusing on leadership and soft skills in high-performance sport. This session will explore the practical, often overlooked elements of leadership that directly impact athlete buy-in, staff alignment, and performance environments. The webinar runs from 09:00вАУ11:30 (GMT+1) and includes one educational credit. Secure your spot via the link below.

item.title: KENNA SMOAK-MINNICI & JARED WOODS - S&C @ ARMY WEST POINT #122
item.description:
Jump testing without the faff. Manny sits down with West PointвАЩs Jared Woods and Kenna Smoak-Minnici to get real about force plates vs. jump mats, which metrics actually move programming, and how to build systems that donвАЩt steal training time. If you coach jumping sportsвАФor just want cleaner decisions from messy dataвАФthis oneвАЩs a blueprint.


In-this-playbook

  • The two metrics that matter (MRSI + peak power/body mass) and the 4-quadrant model to flip testing into training decisions.

  • How to run weekly post-practice jump testing (cascade style) without losing a single setвАФand use it as a primer.

  • Seasonal baselines and athlete buy-in: why off-season jumps can dip (and how to communicate it so athletes stay bought in).

Featuring: practical trade-offs (force plates vs. mats/phone apps), readiness vs. performance testing, and adapting across facilities with limited time and space.

item.title: KOSTA TELEGADAS - TACTICAL S&C COACH #121
item.description:
Kosta (tactical S&C, based in Italy) went from banged-up high-school hooper to the guy tactical units trust to get strong, stay healthy, and still have a life. HeвАЩs blunt about the college grind, ruthless about simplicity, and laser-focused on building careers that donвАЩt burn you outвАФor your athletes.


In-this-playbook:

вАҐ¬† Tactical template that adapts itself. Build a 5-day master plan, then strip to 3-day and 2-day versions without losing intent. Color-code sessions for 20/45/60-minute windows (red/blue/black): hit the must-dos when time is tight, expand when you can. Consistency > perfection.

вАҐ¬† Auto-regulate like an adult. Program by ranges (think 70вАУ77% RI), push when the barвАЩs moving, pull when lifeвАЩs heavy. Swap regressions on the fly (belt squat, front-rack split squat, DB patterns) so training never stalls just because someone hates back squats.

вАҐ¬† Be first, then be good. Bridge U.S. coaching savvy with European science; bring basic S&C into sport cultures that never had it. Simple, repeatable work winsвАФask the judo kids who stopped getting hurt and started winning.


Upcoming Webinar вАУ 7th February

item.title: DAVE SNYDER - ATHLETIC TRAINER @ BAYLOR #120
item.description:
Dave Snyder (Baylor Basketball) is an athletic trainer with two decades in the trenchesвАФfootball to hoopsвАФwho turns injuries into clear, fast return-to-play plans. HeвАЩs a systems guy: objective data, ruthless practicality, and athlete buy-in so players actually stay on the court.


steal-this-playbook:

вАҐ High-performance that works. One team across AT, S&C, nutrition, mental health, and sport scienceвАФclear roles, daily touchpoints, and a single goal: keep the wheel spinning.

вАҐ Triage like a pro. Sort long-term vs. short/mid at intake, then build the roadmap: protect tissue, preserve capacity, and integrate the weight room the moment an athlete is вАЬallowed to sweat.вАЭ

вАҐ Reverse-engineer game day. Start from the tip-off and work backward: dose the day-before load, account for schedule density, and customize for nagging issuesвАФbasketball realities, not theory.

item.title: TIM SUCHOMEL - ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR @ UNIVERSITY OF PITTSBURGH #119
item.description:
Tim Suchomel is an Associate Professor at the University of Pittsburgh and a rare research-meets-weight-room operatorвАФequal parts lab brain and barbell coach. He builds stronger, faster athletes by turning messy training into clean data and making strength science brutally practical.


steal-this-playbook:

вАҐ Weight room = lab. Monitor in real time, adjust in real time. Track sets/reps plus simple outputs (CMJ, RSI) and let the sessionвАЩs data steer the next blockвАФno ivory tower required.

вАҐ Pulls for power. Use pulling variations (clean pulls, high pulls, jump shrugs) when catching isnвАЩt the priority; match loading intelligently to get equalвАФor betterвАФstimulus with fewer technical bottlenecks.

вАҐ VBT with intent. ItвАЩs a tool, not a religion. Lock technique first, then chase the right metric for the exercise and athlete. Remember: bar speed вЙ† body speed.

item.title: MICHAEL STEGEMOELLER - S&C COACH @ UNIVERSITY OF PITTSBURGH #118
item.description:
Michael вАЬCoach StegвАЭ Stegemoeller is the strength & conditioning coach at the University of Pittsburgh, leading WomenвАЩs Lacrosse and Swim & Dive. A former undersized soccer kid turned performance nerd, he built his chops at MJP, Houston, Texas A&M, and CincinnatiвАФand now engineers teams that hit harder, move faster, and donвАЩt fade.


Steal-this-playbook:

вАҐ¬† Periodize under constraints. Vertical integration + APRE (6/3) to touch all qualities; front-squat base вЖТ box-squat peaking; manage вАЬhighвАЭ days when the sport staff wants Tue/Thu Olympic-only sessionsвАФkeep qualities alive without frying athletes.

вАҐ¬† Readiness that actually works. Conversations > gadgets, plus CMJ/RSI twice weekly; if outputs dip or practice smoked them, swap full-ROM for pins/boxes, trim accessories, or chase singles/doubles. Remember: how you feel can lieвАФlet performance set the throttle.

вАҐ¬† Culture that travels. Show up at practice, own warm-ups, coordinate with coaches in the open; build enough trust that when it gets dark, they toe the line and keep going.

item.title: RETT LARON - S&C COACH @ ECZACIBA≈ЯI DYNAVIT #117
item.description:
Rett Larson is an Olympic and pro volleyball S&C coach who turns warm-ups into real training and intent into horsepower. He gamifies everythingвАФmeasured jumps, landmine throws, reverse treadmill sprints, and sneaky isometricsвАФso athletes get explosive, durable, and hooked. Creator of No Zombies, he thrives under constraints and builds teams that leave the gym sweaty, smiling, and better.


steal-this-playbook:

вАҐ Warm-up = development block. Games that earn the grind (tag/volley variants вЖТ 2вАУ3 min micro-dosed isos), then one tracked jump per lift (weighted block/approach/drop-catch), constraints rotated daily (broad-in, left-only, band-accommodated, <200 ms contacts), pairs/leaderboards so intent stays real.

вАҐ Constraints > cues (perceptionвАУaction). Replace cone mazes with spikeball/pickleball/table tennis, copy fencing-style decel, and if you keep ladders, make them leaderвАУfollower for rhythm + reactivity. Design the drill so the body learns without the speech.

вАҐ Shoulders + posterior chain the volleyball way. Straight-arm capacity (ring hangs + L-sits, handstand holds), landmine coiled-core jerks and throws to vertical (heavier if it still hits vertical), plus Bulgarians/RDLs/Nordics and curved-treadmill badges (chasing top km/h) for the other side of the forceвАУvelocity curve; early season hides eccentrics/isos in warm-ups, late season skews reactive/play.

вАҐ Creativity under constraints (and the toolbox tiers). No flywheels? Use BOSU (ball-up adduction squeeze), bands, noodles as вАЬswords,вАЭ partner backpedal knees-over-toes starts. Build a living library: explore in warm-ups вЖТ promote what works, demote what doesnвАЩt. When the HC says вАЬarm speed,вАЭ the next two weeks of warm-ups look like arm speedвАФmed-ball throws, landmines, sprint cuesвАФmeasured and scored.

item.title: CHRISTINA BERNAL - S&C COACH @ U of PENN #116
item.description:
Christina Bernal (Penn S&C) sits down for a raw, no-BS deep dive on building buy-in in the Ivy League, coaching rowers and jumpers in the same room, and why the team-around-the-team matters most when athletes get hurt. We get into contrast training youвАЩre probably not using yet, the micro calls she makes between practice and lift, and coaching the human firstвАФdata, nuance, and a little Nickelback for good measure.


Steal-this-playbook:


  • Contrast beyond вАЬjust load.вАЭ ROM contrasts, uni вЖФ bi, assisted вЖФ resisted, pins/quarter squats for sprinters & jumpers, plus how she stacks plyos (POGOs вЖТ depth drop to box jump) with cleansвАФand why heavy lives Monday while neuro-prep and вАЬfeel fastвАЭ work land late-week.

  • Rowing realities, solved. Long warm-ups after class, CNS вАЬwake-ups,вАЭ keeping rib-stress and lat fatigue from nuking the session (trap bar вЖТ belt squat/leg press swaps) while protecting water time through daily AT collaboration.

  • CoachвАЩs eye + simple data. Weekly RSI/CMJ to catch midterm dips, Perch for athlete ownership, and the 15вАУ30 minute window she uses to rewrite a lift after watching practice.

  • Culture that sticks. Buy-in without scholarships, pairing leaders & followers on racks, non-negotiable standards (clean the room, raise the bar), coffee check-ins, and using music requests as a sneaky intent switch.

item.title: THOMAS NEWMAN - FOUNDER OF NEWMAN HP #101
item.description:
Thomas Newman is back on the podcast вАФ and this time, heвАЩs doing it all under his own banner. Now working independently through Newman HP, Thomas brings even more clarity, edge, and impact to the performance world.


In this episode, we dive into whatвАЩs changed, whatвАЩs stayed true, and what it really means to coach athletes at the highest level. From elite-level programming decisions to managing athlete readiness with purpose, Thomas shares raw, unfiltered takes that challenge the norms of the industry.


If youвАЩre a coach, youвАЩll walk away with:

  • A better understanding of performance under pressure

item.title: 100 EPISODES OF PA CHALK UP!!
item.description:
Episode 100 вАУ The Best of PA Chalk Up (100 Episodes Strong)


100 episodes. A hundred conversations that have shaped how we look at strength & conditioning, sport science, and what it actually means to coach athletes.


To celebrate, weвАЩve pulled together 10 of the most powerful moments from past guestsвАФraw, unfiltered insights that stick with you long after the mic is off:

  • вАЛRon McKeefery вАУ Building confidence in coaches.
  • вАЛMike Boyle вАУ Sport science integration in the industry and building confidence in all lifts.
  • вАЛDane Miller вАУ Do hard lifts; theyвАЩre not hard to teach.
  • вАЛPaul Comfort вАУ The importance of conditioning in sport.
  • вАЛJoey Guarascio вАУ Building preparation for practice.
  • вАЛBert Sorin вАУ The Open Door Theory.
  • вАЛSean Swetnam вАУ No excuses on performance standards.
  • вАЛAJ Middleton вАУ Taking athletes to the deep end.
  • вАЛThomas Newman вАУ Myths of periodisation.
  • вАЛRay Zingler вАУ ItвАЩs okay to not hit 100% all the time.

This oneвАЩs a throwback highlight reel. Ten clips. Ten lessons. Ten reminders of why we started this podcast in the first place.

item.title: BLAIR LLOYD - DIRECTOR OF PERFORMANCE #99
item.description:

item.title: AJ MIDDLETON | S&C COACH @ SEATTLE PREP #97
item.description:
AJ Middleton is the Head Strength & Conditioning Coach at Seattle Prep High School, but to me, heвАЩs much more than just a title. I first met AJ during our time at the University of Washington, where he was not only a coach but also the driving force behind the internship program. It was in that setting that I had the privilege to learn directly under his guidance.


AJ shaped a huge part of my coaching foundation. His mentorship went beyond just sets and repsвАФhe taught me how to think critically, communicate effectively, and lead with intent. A lot of how I approach coaching todayвАФmy systems, standards, and even the way I handle athlete developmentвАФcan be traced back to what I learned from AJ in those early days.


Having him on the podcast was not only a full-circle moment, but a reminder of how impactful great mentorship can be. If youвАЩre a young coach looking to learn from someone who genuinely invests in people, AJвАЩs someone you want in your corner.

item.title: PA CHALK UP: THE BREAKDOWN - SVEN HERZOG #3
item.description:
Today we are joined by Sven Herzog who is a German performance coach currently working with FSV Mainz 05, a club in the Bundesliga, Germany's top football league. Sven has also engaged in innovative collaborations with technologies such as Moxy, which involves Near-Infrared Spectroscopy (NIRS) to measure muscle oxygenation during training. This approach provides real-time insights into player fatigue and internal training load, helping refine individualized fitness and conditioning strategiesSven take on:

"How MOXY can be used in football and what it can do for athletes performance"


If you want to check out Moxy and what they are selling, Moxy have offered all listeners a 5% discount to all orders! Check out Moxy and use code: PACHALKUP for 5%.

item.title: OLIVIA ABDOO - SPORTS MEDICINE @ UFC PI #96
item.description:
Olivia Abdoo, sports medicine expert at the UFC Performance Institute, joins us to break down the brand new concussion protocol created to help UFC fighters return to sport both safely and efficiently.


We explore:

вЬЕ How the UFC PI built a system rooted in athlete safety and performance

вЬЕ The blend of neuroscience, cognitive return-to-play benchmarks, and fight-specific demands

вЬЕ How Olivia's experience shaped the framework for treating head trauma in combat sports

вЬЕ Why the protocol goes beyond clearance and focuses on capacity to compete


This episode is a must-listen for anyone interested in high-stakes return-to-play strategy, brain health, and athlete-first performance systems.

item.title: MATRIXX FERREIRA - FOUNDER @ IRON PERFORMANCE #91
item.description:
In this episode of PA Chalk Up, I sit down with Matrixx FerreiraвАФCanadian strength coach, founder of Iron Performance, and a guy whoвАЩs doing things differently in the world of athlete development. From the ground up, Matrixx has built a training facility where culture, mentorship, and performance collide. We talk about the behind-the-scenes structure of Iron Performance, how he blends pro and youth athletes in the same space to create organic mentorship moments, and why his session model is a masterclass in leadership development.

We also dive into the programming philosophy that drives results, the psychology behind creating a growth environment, and why Matrixx believes in giving younger athletes a seat at the table. If youвАЩre a coach, an athlete, or someone who loves high-performance conversationsвАФyouвАЩre gonna love this one.

item.title: VALERIE SMITH-HALE - OLYMPIC S&C COACH @ UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME #90
item.description:
Valerie Smith-Hale is a strength and conditioning coach working with womenвАЩs soccer at Notre Dame. SheвАЩs also doing something a lot of coaches talk about but never actually doвАФconducting her own research and getting it approved.


We sat down and got into everything:вАУ How she actually programs for soccer athletesвАУ Load management that goes way beyond the basicsвАУ What it's like balancing real coaching with leading applied researchвАУ Why the field needs less fluff and more practical dataвАУ Navigating the politics of coaching, research, and athlete wellbeing

item.title: FRED HALE - AD of S&C FOOTBALL @ UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME #86
item.description:
In this episode of PA Chalk Up, we welcome Fred Hale, Assistant Director of Strength & Conditioning at the legendary University of Notre Dame football program.

Fred brings years of experience working at the highest levels of collegiate football, and he currently helps lead the physical preparation for one of the most iconic teams in NCAA history. From developing explosive power and durability in elite athletes to managing training loads across a demanding D1 season, Fred offers a deep dive into what it takes to build a high-performance environment at scale.


We cover:

- The performance philosophy behind Notre Dame Football

- How Fred structures training in-season vs. off-season

- The culture and standards that separate good from great


Whether youвАЩre coaching high school, college, or pro, this episode is packed with takeaways to level up your program. FredвАЩs grounded, science-backed, and athlete-first approach is a masterclass in modern S&C.рЯСЙ Tap in to learn what it really takes to develop championship-level athletes at Notre Dame.

item.title: CRISTIAN LAMBRECHT - HEAD S&C BILBAO BASKET #85
item.description:
In this episode of PA Chalk Up, we sit down with Cristian Lambrecht, one of Argentina's most accomplished strength and conditioning coaches, now applying his expertise at the professional level with Bilbao Basket in Spain.

Cristian has over two decades of experience developing elite athletes and has worked across multiple top-level teams and international federations. His resume includes time with ArgentinaвАЩs national basketball and volleyball programs, and he's widely respected for his work in sports performance, athlete rehabilitation, and high-performance culture.

In this conversation, we dive into:

  • His transition from Argentina to the European basketball scene

  • How he's reshaped Bilbao BasketвАЩs physical preparation model

  • The strategies that led to BilbaoвАЩs recent FIBA Europe Cup victory рЯПЖ

  • His personal evolution as a coach working across cultures and continents

Cristian brings a unique perspective on what it means to build and maintain elite performance in todayвАЩs game. Whether you're a coach, athlete, or sport science nerd, this is an episode you donвАЩt want to miss.

рЯСЙ Tune in and learn from one of the best in the game.

item.title: SEAN SWETNAM - ASSISTANT S&C COACH @ UCLA #84
item.description:
Sean Swetnam returns to dive DEEP into the inner workings of UCLA FootballвАЩs high-performance system.

We talk hamstring profiling, VBT protocols, Nordic alternatives, hydration testing, and how to get athletes genuinely fired up to train after full-pads practice. Sean breaks down the real stuffвАФhow technology gets used (and misused), why asymmetry isnвАЩt always a red flag, and how buy-in is built through consistency and clarity. We even get into voodoo floss, the psychology of strain, and why optimal training might be a myth.

Coach Sweat is a beastвАФand also hilarious. If you train athletes, work in high performance, or just love hearing passionate people talk shop, don't miss this one.

item.dc:creator: Manny Silveira
item.itunes:summary:
Sean Swetnam returns to dive DEEP into the inner workings of UCLA FootballвАЩs high-performance system.

We talk hamstring profiling, VBT protocols, Nordic alternatives, hydration testing, and how to get athletes genuinely fired up to train after full-pads practice. Sean breaks down the real stuffвАФhow technology gets used (and misused), why asymmetry isnвАЩt always a red flag, and how buy-in is built through consistency and clarity. We even get into voodoo floss, the psychology of strain, and why optimal training might be a myth.

Coach Sweat is a beastвАФand also hilarious. If you train athletes, work in high performance, or just love hearing passionate people talk shop, don't miss this one.

item.title: DANE MILLER - FOUNDER OF GARAGE STRENGTH #83
item.description:
Dane Miller is a world-class strength and conditioning coach and the founder of Garage Strength, a private training facility in the USA known for producing elite-level athletes. With a proven track record of coaching competitors to the world stageвАФincluding international championships and the Olympic GamesвАФDane brings unmatched experience and intensity to every athlete he trains.


Beyond the weight room, Dane is also the driving force behind one of the most respected educational platforms on YouTube for coaches and athletes alike. His channel, Garage Strength, is packed with evidence-based insights, training philosophy breakdowns, and actionable content designed to elevate physical performance across all levels of sport. Whether itвАЩs Olympic weightlifting, wrestling, football, or general athletic development, DaneвАЩs mission is clear: to help athletes become the strongest, fastest, and most resilient versions of themselvesвАФwhile helping coaches sharpen their craft along the way.

item.title: RYAN CROSON - PRIVATE S&C COACH #82
item.description:
Ryan Croson is a former Baylor track athlete and now a strength & conditioning coach working with high school athletes and general population clients at a public gym. We met while coaching at the University of Washington, and this episode is just two coaches talking shop.

We get into speed development, how his background as a sprinter shapes his coaching today, and what itвАЩs really like going client to client вАФ from high school kids to everyday adults. ItвАЩs raw, real, and packed with honest insight about navigating the coaching world outside of big-time sport.

item.title: MARCO ALTINI - HRV SPECIALIST #80
item.description:
Dr. Marco Altini is a data scientist, entrepreneur, and the creator of HRV4Training вАФ an app used by athletes and coaches around the world to make smarter training decisions using heart rate variability and other physiological data. With a PhD in data science and a background in machine learning and wearable tech, Marco breaks down the science behind recovery, performance, and why your resting heart rate might be more important than your bench press. Whether you're a coach, athlete, or just a nerd for numbers вАФ this one's for you.

item.title: CURTIS VAN WYCK - CURTIS CLAY TRAINING #79
item.description:
Curtis Clay Training is a premier athletic training facility in Seattle, Washington, founded by Curtis Van Wyck himself. Known for his holistic approach, Curtis helps athletes overcome imbalances and unlock their full potential. Our paths first crossed during an internship with the Washington Huskies, where I had the chance to visit his facility and dive into some great conversations. Curtis has played a major role in shaping my coaching career, so having him on the podcast was an absolute honor. Tune in as we break down the innovative training methods and philosophies that make his facility stand out!

item.title: PA CHALK UP: THE BREAKDOWN - VSPC #1
item.description:
From the Office to the Spotlight: Real-Life Conference Topics Unpacked


In this session, we dive deep into a critical conversation brought straight from the conference stage to your screen.


Joining us today are Patrick Kasztner and Katharina Bank, two renowned physiotherapists based in Vienna, Austria. TheyвАЩre the driving forces behind the Vienna Sportsphysiotherapy & Performance Center, where they specialize in helping elite athletes across Austria recover, perform, and return to play at the highest level.


Together, weвАЩll explore the question:


"Are Physiotherapy Protocols Equipped to Return Athletes to Peak Performance?"


Patrick and Katharina bring a wealth of expertise and firsthand experience, and weвАЩre breaking it all down right here.


Got thoughts or insights? Be part of the discussion! Drop your comments below and letвАЩs unpack their perspective together.

VSPC Socials:

Katharina - @katharinabank Andreas - @andreas.klima

@_coachmanny_

mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: KYLE CASILLAS | PRIVATE S&C COACH #69
item.description:
Join us for an insightful conversation with Kyle, a seasoned strength and conditioning coach based in South Dakota. Kyle runs a comprehensive program that caters to a diverse range of athletes, from high school students to adults. At his cutting-edge facility, he has forged a unique partnership with the local health system and a nearby high school, creating an integrated approach to performance and rehabilitation.


In this episode, we explore the growing trend of physiotherapists collaborating within gym settings, the evolving role of strength coaches in tactical professions, and the shift towards athlete-centric programming in the weight room. Whether you're a coach, athlete, or fitness enthusiast, this discussion dives deep into innovative ways to elevate training and performance.

item.title: JOHN BLOOM | AUTHOR & PRIVATE S&C COACH #68
item.description:
Today, weвАЩre joined by John Bloom, a seasoned strength and conditioning coach with extensive experience in the collegiate setting, who has now transitioned to the private sector. John shares insights from his upcoming book, Strength in Numbers, a compelling exploration into the minds of professional sports coaches, strength coaches, and beyond.


In this episode, we dive deep into his creative process and discuss some of the impactful stories and lessons featured in the book. From navigating the dynamic world of coaching to uncovering the strategies that drive success, John provides a fascinating behind-the-scenes look at what it takes to thrive in the competitive landscape of sports and performance. item.description:
Join us for an insightful episode featuring Dr. Tim Suchomel, a globally recognized expert in strength and conditioning. Known for his groundbreaking research in weightlifting derivatives, explosive power development, and sports science application, Dr. Suchomel blends academic expertise with practical insights.


In this episode, we delve into:
вЬЕ The science behind effective power training
вЬЕ How weightlifting movements can enhance athletic performance
вЬЕ Bridging the gap between research and real-world application


Whether you're a coach, athlete, or sports enthusiast, Dr. Suchomel's knowledge and passion will leave you inspired to rethink your training strategies.

Tune in to discover her insights on fostering resilience, strength, and self-belief through tailored training methods that inspire athletes to thrive both in and out of the gym. Whether you're a coach or an athlete, this episode offers valuable takeaways on confidence-building and effective coaching strategies.


For more about the Webinar on вАЬPractical Application of Sports Science DataвАЭ visit primitiveathletix.com. Here you can also order your ticket and become one step closer to understanding the tests you are running - more announcements to come soon!!

item.title: JOSIE STEVENS | PERFORMANCE TRAINER #44
item.description:
On this episode of PA Chalk Up, we sit down with Josie Stevens, a Personal Trainer who takes an approach to health and wellness that places longevity at its core. Josie believes that true fitness encompasses not just aesthetics but also longevity, mobility, functional fitness, and optimal performance. These elements are often treated as separate entities in today's fitness space, but Josie combines all aspects throughout her programmes.


Based in Los Angeles, she is an ACE certified personal trainer, corrective exercise specialist, pre/post-natal exercise specialist, and accomplished athlete. With a background as a 4-year Division 1 Collegiate Athlete, Josie's passion for athletics has been a driving force throughout her life.

If you enjoyed this episode, make sure to like and follow the page. We push an episode out every wednesday so make sure to stay tuned. If you want to annoy any of your friends, share the video with them!


Josies's Social:

Instagram - @jevityfit


Josie's Website:

https://athleticlongevity.training/


Manny's Social:

Instagram - @_coachmanny_ & @pachalkup


Enquiries:

mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: OBO CHIKEZIE | PHYSICAL THERAPIST #43
item.description:
Welcome to PA Chalk Up!! In this episode, we chat with Obo Chikezie, a dedicated physical therapist from Boston, MA. Splitting his time between a clinical setting and a local gym, Obo implements specialized programs tailored for each patient and client. He masterfully blends physical performance techniques with manual manipulation to help people regain their active lifestyles. Tune in as we delve into his unique process and insightful considerations, designed to inspire and inform. Join us for an engaging discussion that could transform your approach to health and fitness!
Obo's Social: Instagram - @obophysio
Manny's Socials: Instagram - @_coachmanny_ & @pachalkup

item.title: AARON SPIRA | CHRONIC INJURY RECOVERY COACH #42
item.description:
In this episode, we sit down with Aaron Spira, a Chronic Injury Coach dedicated to guiding individuals battling with conditions like EDS (Ehlers-Danlos syndrome), POTS (Postural Orthostatic Tachycardia Syndrome), and various healing challenges. Aaron shares profound insights into his strategies for empowering himself and his clients towards achieving functional movement despite their chronic conditions.
Join us as we delve into the intricate nuances of these conditions, unraveling the hurdles individuals face, and exploring the pathways towards reclaiming mobility and vitality. Aaron sheds light on his journey into this specialised field, offering a glimpse into the personal experiences that shaped his approach.
From practical tips to profound revelations, this episode is a must-listen for anyone navigating the complexities of chronic conditions or seeking a deeper understanding of the human body's resilience and adaptability. Tune in to discover how Aaron Spira is transforming lives, one step at a time.
Aaron's Social: Instagram - @thejointcoach
Manny's Socials: Instagram - @_coachmanny_ & @pachalkup
Enquiries: Email - mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: THOMAS NEWMAN | ELITE PERFORMANCE S&C COACH #41
item.description:
Join us on this episode as we dive into the world of strength and conditioning with Thomas Newman, a renowned coach who has made significant impacts at both Ivy League institutions and in professional sports. As the Lead Performance Specialist at the Center for Sports Performance and Research at Mass General Brigham, Tom brings a wealth of knowledge and experience to the table. His innovative approach blends cutting-edge research with practical training techniques, helping athletes achieve peak performance and recover from injuries.
In addition to his role at Mass General Brigham, Tom has also worked extensively with Hawkin Dynamics, where he applied his expertise in sports science to develop advanced performance monitoring systems. This integration of technology and training has helped numerous athletes and teams improve their performance metrics and gain a competitive edge.
Furthermore, Tom has recently came out with a book where he co authored with industry titan Dr William Kraemer so make sure to grab the book "Developing the Athelte". It gives coaches a common language to better develop their athletes no matter where you are and what language you speak!
Tune in as we explore Tom's unique methodologies, his journey through various prestigious roles, and how he continues to push the boundaries of sports performance. Whether you're an athlete, coach, or sports enthusiast, this episode offers valuable insights into the art and science of strength and conditioning.
Thomas Newmands Website: www.newmanhp.com/
Thomas' Social: Instagram - @newman.hp
Thomas' Book: www.amazon.com/Developing-Athlete-Applied-Optimizing-Performance-ebook/dp/B0CDNQ7T7Q
Manny's Social: Instagram - @_coachmanny_
Enquiries: Email - mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: MESA McNELY | WOMEN'S SOCCER S&C COACH #39
item.description:
Want the inside scoop on strength and conditioning for professional women's soccer? Tune into this week's episode as we chat with Mason, the new head strength coach for an up-and-coming team.
Mesa shares her unique career journey through college basketball, men's pro soccer, and now training elite female athletes. Learn about her approach to programming, periodization, speed development and ACL injury prevention, balancing in-season maintenance with the demands of a year-round schedule, and establishing a positive culture. We also dive into hot topics like proper hydration, Mesa's favorite pump-up phrases, and how she tailors training to each athlete.
Whether you're an aspiring strength coach or just love sports performance, this episode gives rare insight into the world of women's pro soccer.
Tune in to expand your coaching toolbox!
Mesa's Socials: Instagram - @mesamcnely & @coachmesamcnely
Manny's Socials: Instagram - @_coachmanny_ & ¬†@pachalkup¬†
Enquiries: Email - mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: NEIL YOUNG | YOGA INSTRUCTOR #38
item.description:
Welcome, listeners, to another captivating episode of PA CHALK UP! Today, we're diving into the vibrant world of strength-based yoga with none other than Neil Young вАУ not the rock legend, but a yoga instructor on a mission!
Neil's not just about striking poses; he's all about infusing your practice with energy, purpose, and a whole lot of fun. Picture this: yoga meets strength training, with Neil as your guide through a journey of self-discovery and balance.
But there's more to Neil's mission than meets the eye. He's on a quest to break barriers, not just in the yoga studio, but in men's mental health. Through his men-only workshops, he's creating spaces where strength meets vulnerability, and where warriors find peace on the mat.
So buckle up, folks, as we explore the dynamic fusion of strength, mindfulness, and self-love.
Hit that subscribe button and join us on this exhilarating journey of transformation вАУ because with Neil Young, every breath is a step closer to finding your inner warrior and living life to the fullest!
Neil's Social: Instagram - @neilyoungyogaandmovement
Manny's Socials: Instagram - @_coachmanny_ & @pachalkup
Enquiries: Email - mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: OSCAR MORENO | GPS TRACKING & SPEED DEV #37
item.description:
Get ready for an exhilarating dive into the world of GPS tracking systems in sports!
Joining us is Oscar Moreno, a renowned strength and conditioning coach specialising in speed enhancement. In this episode, we're uncovering the secrets behind speed development, speed profiles, and the groundbreaking McLloyds GPS tracking system.
As the business development manager at McLloyds, based in sunny San Diego, Oscar brings a wealth of expertise to the table. Don't miss out on this dynamic conversation that promises insights, strategies, and a closer look at cutting-edge technology.
Tune in now to get the most out of your athletes.
Oscar's Social: instagram - @oscarbmoreno
Manny's Social: Instagram - @_coachmanny_ & @pachalkup

item.title: MARTIN SZUCS | NATIONAL HUNGARIAN HANDBALL S&C COACH #36
item.description:
Step onto the court and into the world of elite handball performance with Martin Szucs, the Head Strength Coach for the National Hungarian Handball Team, on PA Chalk Up!
About Our Guest: Meet Martin Szucs, the driving force behind the strength and conditioning regimen of the National Hungarian Handball Team. In this episode, Martin shares his valuable insights into testing methodologies, training routines, and considerations for optimizing performance in handball athletes.
Key Highlights: - Join us as we dissect Martin's testing methodologies, providing a behind-the-scenes look at how he assesses and fine-tunes the strength and conditioning programs for handball athletes. - Discover the intricacies of an average day for national athletes during qualifying seasons, Olympic build-up, and beyond, gaining insights into the rigorous training and preparation required for elite competition. - Explore Martin's strategies for catering to the diverse athlete profiles in handball, ensuring that each player receives personalized attention and support to maximize their potential on the court.
Empowering Handball Performance: In a sport as dynamic and demanding as handball, every advantage counts. Join us as we unravel Martin's secrets to unlocking peak performance in handball athletes, from training methodologies to mindset strategies.
Tune in now and gain exclusive access to the strength secrets of the Hungarian Handball Team with Martin Szucs! Subscribe, share, and elevate your understanding of elite athlete performance.

item.title: POSEIDON STRENGTH #35
item.description:
Dive into the cutting-edge world of strength training innovation with Poseidon Strength, the trailblazing company behind intent-based training and the revolutionary Isokinetic machine, on PA CHALK UP!
About Our Guest: Meet Poseidon Strength, the strength-based organization dedicated to delivering meaningful strength data through intent-based training. With their groundbreaking Isokinetic machine, Poseidon Strength is reshaping the landscape of strength coaching by providing real-time data and actionable insights to athletes and program staff.
Key Highlights: - Explore the mission of Poseidon Strength to deliver simple yet meaningful strength data through intent-based training. - Learn about the importance of real-time data and top-line trend comparisons in keeping athletes engaged and performance-focused. - Discover how Poseidon Strength's innovative approach enables rapid athlete assessment, isometric and force/velocity profiling, and performance progression tracking. - We also dive into the remaping of return to play and how Poseidon Strength aids in the returning better faster stronger while working on their psychological side.
Empowering Strength Coaches: In a world where data analysis and synthesis can be time-consuming, Poseidon Strength offers a solution with their real-time data and simplified metrics. Join us as we delve into how their system empowers strength coaches to drive performance and maximize athlete engagement.
Built for Excellence: Poseidon Strength's commitment to simplicity, durability, and uptime ensures that coaches and athletes can rely on their system for accurate and actionable data acquisition without disruption.
Tune in now and discover how Poseidon Strength is revolutionizing the strength training landscape! Subscribe, share, and embark on a journey of strength and innovation.
Poseidon Strength: Website - www.poseidonstrength.com
Poseidon Strength Socials: Instagram - @poseidonstrength
Manny's Socials: Instagram - @_coachmanny_ & @pachalkup
Enquiries: Email - mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: SAM NORMAN | SOCIAL MEDIA FOR COACHES #34
item.description:
Unlock the secrets to social media success with Sam Norman, the mastermind behind Hidden Summit Social Media, on PA CHALK UP!
About Our Guest: Meet Sam Norman, the powerhouse behind Hidden Summit Social Media, renowned for her expertise in helping strength coaches and fitness professionals thrive in the digital landscape. In this episode, Sam shares invaluable strategies for growing your social media presence and standing out in the crowded fitness industry.
Key Discussion Points: - Join us as Sam breaks down effective strategies for boosting your social media presence as a strength coach or fitness professional. - Dive deep into the pitfalls of excessive supplement content, including protein powder and creatine, and discover why it may hinder your online success. - Gain actionable recommendations from Sam on where to focus your energy to maximize engagement and impact on social media.
Empower Your Online Presence: Whether you're a seasoned coach or a budding fitness enthusiast, this episode is your ticket to mastering social media strategies that drive results. Sam's insights and recommendations will empower you to elevate your online presence and connect with your audience authentically.
Tune in now and revolutionize your social media game with Sam Norman of Hidden Summit Social Media!
Your Support Matters: Your support fuels our mission to provide valuable content to our listeners. Please consider following, rating, and leaving a comment to help us continue delivering insightful episodes like this one.
Sam's Social: Instagram - @samminormanfit
Manny's Socials: Instagram - @_coachmanny_ & @pachalkup
Enquiries: Email - mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: OLIVIA ABDOO | PHYSICAN TRAINER AT THE UFC PI #33
item.description:
Join us as we sit down with Olivia Abdoo, the Physical Training Manager at the UFC Performance Institute!
About Our Guest: Meet Olivia Abdoo, a trailblazer in the realm of concussion research and athlete care. With her role at the UFC Performance Institute, Olivia leads in developing and implementing cutting-edge concussion protocols to safeguard athletes' well-being for all athletes at the UFC Performance Institute.
Key Discussion Points: - Delve into Olivia's journey through the industry, gaining insights into the progression of physical training and athlete care. - Join us as we dissect the latest advancements in concussion research and explore the intricacies of UFC's concussion protocol. - Discover the "low hanging fruit" in concussion protocol, as Olivia shares actionable strategies for optimizing athlete safety and recovery.
Join the Conversation: Don't miss this opportunity to gain insider insights into concussion management in the world of UFC. Join us as we unravel the complexities of concussion protocols and their impact on athlete performance and well-being.
Your Support Matters: Your support fuels our mission to bring you the latest in sports science and athlete care. Please consider following, rating, and leaving a comment to help us continue providing valuable content to our listeners.

item.title: ARCHIE OGDEN | U21 SHEFFIELD UNITED FC S&C COACH #32
item.description:
Step into the world of elite football performance on PA CHALK UP, as we sit down with Archie, the dedicated strength and conditioning coach for Sheffield United FC U21 squad!


About Our Guest:

Meet Archie, the driving force behind Sheffield United FC U21s. With three league victories under their belt, Archie shares insights from the trenches of football strength and conditioning, offering valuable lessons in buy-in, player accountability, and continuous improvement.


Key Highlights:

- Archie's strategies for fostering buy-in among players, empowering them to take ownership of their performance on and off the field.

- Discover how Archie and his team serve as role models for younger athletes, setting the standard for professionalism and dedication in the footballing world.

- Explore the relentless pursuit of excellence that defines Archie's approach as a strength and conditioning coach, as he shares his insights on constantly striving for improvement.


Empowering Football Performance:

Archie unveils the behind-the-scenes secrets to unlocking peak performance in football, offering practical tips and techniques for players, coaches, and enthusiasts alike.


Why You Should Tune In:

Whether you're a football fanatic, a fitness enthusiast, or someone hungry for insights into elite performance, this episode is your playbook for success. Join Archie as he shares his wisdom and experience.


Hit play now and gain exclusive access to the strategies that drive success on the football pitch with Archie. Subscribe, share, and elevate your game to new heights!

item.title: AMANDA DAWSON | PELVIC FLOOR SPECIALIST #31
item.description:
Prepare for an enlightening journey into the realm of pelvic health and rehabilitation on PA CHALK UP, as we sit down with Amanda Dawson, a leading physiotherapist based in Toronto, Canada!


About Our Guest:Meet Amanda Dawson, a trailblazing physiotherapist renowned for her expertise in pelvic health. With a focus ranging from normal function to postpartum recovery and athlete return to play, Amanda brings a wealth of knowledge and experience to the table.


Key Highlights:

- Join us as we unravel Amanda's processes and considerations in pelvic health rehabilitation, gaining valuable insights into her holistic approach to patient care.

- Explore the nuances of postpartum recovery and athlete return to play under Amanda's expert guidance, understanding the unique challenges and considerations in each scenario.


Empowering Women's Health:

Amanda Dawson sheds light on the importance of pelvic health in women's overall well-being, empowering listeners with knowledge and strategies to optimize their pelvic health journey.


Why You Should Tune In:

Whether you're navigating pelvic health challenges yourself or seeking to broaden your understanding of rehabilitation practices, this episode offers a comprehensive guide to pelvic health and rehabilitation. Amanda's expertise and compassionate approach make this a must-listen for anyone interested in optimizing their physical well-being.


Hit play now and embark on a transformative journey with Amanda Dawson. Subscribe, share, and empower yourself with the knowledge to thrive in pelvic health!

Instagram - @ptwithad

item.description:
Get ready for a ringside seat to the world of elite strength and conditioning on PA CHALK UP, as we sit down with Becky Summers, a powerhouse strength and conditioning coach at the UFC Performance Institute!

item.description:
Prepare to embark on a journey of body awareness and injury resilience on PA Chalk Up, as we sit down with Josh Chang, a distinguished physiotherapist based in Toronto, Canada!

item.title: PIETER BULSINK | S&C FOR MOTOR SPORTS #27
item.description:
Buckle up for an exhilarating ride on PA Chalk Up, as we explore the cutting-edge world of motorsports conditioning with Pieter Bulsink, a trailblazing strength and conditioning coach hailing from the Netherlands!
About Our Guest: Meet Pieter Bulsink, a visionary in the field of strength and conditioning, specifically tailored for motorsports athletes. With an impressive track record working with a diverse range of motorsport teams, Pieter has redefined the landscape of conditioning in the Netherlands. His athlete-centric approach not only transforms bodies but challenges athletes psychologically and cognitively, setting new benchmarks in the realm of sports performance.
Key Highlights: - Uncover Pieter's innovative methods that have reshaped the way strength and conditioning is approached in motorsports. - Gain insights into his athlete-focused coaching philosophy, which extends beyond physical challenges to encompass psychological and cognitive dimensions. - Discover how Pieter's unique approach to conditioning has shaped his athletes.
Hit play now and experience the revolution in motorsports conditioning with Pieter Bulsink. Subscribe, share, rate the show and gear up for a high-octane journey into the world of strength and conditioning!
Pieter's Socials: Instagram - @mavericktraining.nl
Manny's Socials: Instagram - @_coachmanny_ & @pachalkup
Enquiries: Email - mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: ROB ANDERSON | YOUTH ATHLETIC DEVELOPMENT #26
item.description:
Welcome to a powerhouse episode of PA Chalk Up, where we dive deep into the dynamic world of youth athlete development with none other than Rob Anderson, founder of The Athlete Academy, Athletic Evolution and the host of the Athletic Evolution Podcast!
About Our Guest: Rob Anderson is a true luminary in the realm of athletic development. Renowned for his expertise in guiding the growth and potential of young athletes, Rob is a sought-after speaker at conferences, workshops, and team talks. In this episode, he generously shares his wealth of knowledge to help coaches, parents, and athletes understand the essential principles of nurturing emerging sports talents.
Key Takeaways: - Discover the core strategies that set Rob apart as a leader in youth athlete development. - Gain insights into the nuanced approaches that contribute to the success of young athletes. - Learn how Rob's passion for education influences his dynamic interactions with coaches, parents, and athletes alike.

item.title: CIARAN GANNON #25
item.description:
Join us for an inspiring episode featuring Ciaran Gannon, a visionary strength coach hailing from the UK, making significant strides in the realm of elite youth soccer development in Philadelphia. Managing the gym experiences of age groups starting from 14 years old, Ciaran's journey from a personal trainer to a pivotal figure in youth soccer is a tale of relentless growth and dedication.
In this episode, delve into Ciaran's transformative journey, marked by a thirst for knowledge and continuous improvement. Starting as a personal trainer, his insatiable appetite for learning propelled him across the Atlantic to the United States, where he embarked on internships, honing his craft and expanding his expertise in the field of strength coaching.
Explore how Ciaran's passion for elite youth soccer development led him to Philadelphia, where he now manages the gym experiences of budding talents. His evolution from a personal trainer to a vital contributor in the development of young athletes showcases his commitment to excellence and the relentless pursuit of knowledge.
Ciaran's Social: @ciarangannon_
Manny's Social: @_coachmanny_ or @pachalkup
Enquiries: mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com
Primitive Athletix Website: www.primitiveathletix.com

item.title: LAILA THOMPSON-WAINER #24
item.description:
Step into the extraordinary world of Laila Thompson-Wainer, a dynamic individual currently pursuing a bachelor's in communication while making waves in sports media. Before her foray into the communications realm, Laila was a force in American football, showcasing her prowess on the field before transitioning into a captivating role shaping viewer experience and entertainment.
In this episode, discover Laila's unique background in American football, unraveling the tale of her drive and passion for the sport. Her journey from the gridiron to the vibrant world of sports media is an inspiring testament to her unwavering determination and adaptability.
Join us as Laila shares her unconventional path into football and subsequently into the realm of communications. Her experiences as a former player enrich her storytelling abilities and fuel her innovative approaches to engaging viewers, whether at the Seattle Kraken, University of Washington, or the NIL Store.

item.title: ANNA TRIMBLE #21
item.description:
Gather 'round for a festive Christmas episode as we welcome Anna Trimble, the trailblazing cycle syncing coach and TikTok sensation dedicated to empowering women in mastering their menstrual cycles. Join us as we unwrap the secrets to understanding and optimizing your cycle with Anna's invaluable insights.
In this special episode, Anna shares her journey, diving deep into the strategies and wisdom she imparts through her TikTok channel. Explore how AnnaвАЩs innovative approach helps women connect with their bodies, offering practical tips for managing and harnessing the power of their menstrual cycles.
Discover Anna's latest ventureвАФa journal designed to navigate and alleviate menstrual symptoms. She takes us on a guided tour through her journal, offering techniques to help you effectively manage cycle.
This Christmas, gift yourself the knowledge and tools to embrace your cycle as Anna Trimble unwraps the mysteries, shares her expertise, and empowers women to harmonize their lives with their menstrual cycles. Join us for a joyous episode filled with invaluable insights and empowering guidance to make every cycle a celebration of strength and self-awareness.

item.title: FREDRIK CORREA #20
item.description:
Join us for an electrifying episode as we sit down with Fredrik Correa, the innovative mind behind Exxentric, a pioneering flywheel manufacturer transforming the fitness landscape. Discover the fascinating journey of Exxentric, unraveling its inception, functionality, and immense benefits in revolutionizing fitness.


Correa enlightens us on the mechanics behind Exxentric, showcasing its versatility and applicability across diverse populations. From elite athletes to rehabilitation patients, delve into the varied demographics benefitting from this cutting-edge technology. Gain insights into how Exxentric's unique loading system sets it apart, offering a dynamic approach to training that optimizes results and minimizes risk of injury.


Explore the science behind flywheel training and its far-reaching impact on strength, endurance, and performance enhancement. Correa delves into the intricacies of Exxentric, revealing its comprehensive methodology and its evolution into a game-changer in the fitness industry.


This episode is your backstage pass to understanding the essence of Exxentric, guided by Fredrik Correa's expertise and passion for redefining fitness through innovative technology. Join us as we unravel the mechanics, benefits, and transformative power of Exxentric's flywheel technology in this captivating conversation.

@go_exxentric

www.exxentric.com

item.title: KEVIN GREEN #19
item.description:
Join us for an enlightening episode with Kevin Green, a seasoned Strength and Conditioning Coach whose career spans coaching some of the finest athletes in the sporting world. Kevin's impressive coaching includes stints at Division 1 level with the Washington Huskies and in the NFL with the Arizona Cardinals.
Kevin's commitment to excellence extends beyond the field or gym. He embodies a growth mindset, a key aspect that sets him apart as a coach. He channels this mindset into every athlete he encounters, fostering an environment conducive to continual improvement and optimal performance.
In this episode, we explore Kevin's coaching philosophy and the importance he places on a growth-oriented approach. Discover firsthand how he instills this mindset into his athletes, both in their training routines and in their broader lives.
Having experienced Kevin's coaching firsthand, I've witnessed his unwavering pursuit of excellence, whether it's within the confines of the gym or out in the field. Join us on PA CHALK UP for an engaging conversation with Kevin Green, where we uncover the principles and practices that drive peak performance in elite athletes.
Kevin's Socials: Instagram - konquer6k X - coachkev6k
Manny's Socials: @_coachmanny or @pachalkup
Enquiries: mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: RON MCKEEFERY #18
item.description:
Welcome to PA Chalk Up, join us as we delve into the world of sports performance and personal development with Coach Ron McKeefery, a true titan in the field. Renowned for his expertise in strength and conditioning, Coach McKeefery has sculpted elite athletes and transformed teams with his unparalleled insights.
But this podcast isn't just about lifting weightsвАФit's about lifting spirits and unlocking human potential. Coach McKeefery's mentorship has fueled my passion for this journey, inspiring the inception of this podcast. Through candid conversations and profound insights, we'll unravel the secrets behind athletic excellence, mental fortitude, and the relentless pursuit of greatness.
Get ready to explore the mindset and methodologies that forge champions, as we dive deep into Coach McKeefery's wealth of experience. From his pivotal role in shaping college football powerhouses to his influence on my own journey, each episode promises a treasure trove of wisdom, practical advice, and motivational stories.
Join us on this transformative ride where we decode the essence of peak performance and resilience. Whether you're an athlete, a coach, or simply hungry for personal growth, this podcast is your compass to achieving extraordinary results. Let's amplify our potential together!
Ron McKeefery's Socials: @rmckeefery
Manny's Socials: @_coachmanny_ or @pachalkup
Enquiries: mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: HEWITT TOMLIN #17
item.description:
Hewitt Tomlin, the Co-CEO of TeamBuildr, embodies the driving force behind one of the most impactful platforms for strength and conditioning coaches. As a visionary leader, his commitment to customer satisfaction sets the gold standard in the industry. TeamBuildr isn't just a workout app; it's a testament to Tomlin's unwavering dedication to empowering coaches worldwide.


Tomlin's relentless pursuit of excellence isn't just about delivering top-notch workout programs; it's about revolutionizing the entire experience and his passion for entrepreneurship. His ethos places the customer at the heart of everything TeamBuildr does, ensuring that each coach feels supported, heard, and equipped with unparalleled tools to excel in their craft.


When you delve into Teambuildr, you're not just accessing a platform; you're entering a realm shaped by Tomlin's passion for personalized support. This dedication is so ingrained in their DNA that even a phone call to Teambuildr welcomes you with a human touchвАФa testament to their commitment to genuine, immediate assistance.


Watch as Hewitt breakdown his process and comitment to growing the industy!


Hewitt's Socials:

LinkedIn - Hewitt Tomlin

Website - www.teambuildr.com


Manny's Socials:

@_coachmanny_ or @pachalkup


Enquiries:

mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: MATT TOMETZ #16
item.description:
Dive into a riveting episode where we explore the multifaceted world of coaching and insightful conversations with Matt Tometz, the Assistant Director at the University of Northwestern. As the host of The Talking Shop Podcast, Matt brings his expertise in coaching to the forefront, intertwining his passion for sports with the art of meaningful dialogue.


Join us as we unravel Matt's journey from the poolside to the dugout, discovering how his coaching philosophy transcends boundaries. With an astute understanding of athletic performance and human connection, Matt shares invaluable insights into the transformative power of coaching in shaping not just sporting prowess, but also fostering personal growth.


In this episode, we delve into the intricacies of coaching strategies, the unique dynamics of guiding both swimmers and baseball players, and how Matt's experiences have influenced his approach to mentorship. Get ready for an enriching conversation where coaching meets captivating storytelling, all encapsulated within the vibrant world of Matt Tometz's coaching journey at the University of Northwestern.


Matt's Socials:

@coachbigtoe


Matt's Podcast:

The Talking Shop Podcast

@_coachmanny_ or @pachalkup

item.title: CAROLINE GONYEA #15
item.description:
Introducing Caroline, a remarkable yoga instructor and strength and conditioning coach who plays a pivotal role at the University of Washington athletic department and collaborates with the Seattle Krakens Ice Hockey Team. Caroline's expertise lies in her profound understanding of bodily movement and her ability to navigate high-stress environments with elite athletes, ensuring their sessions are both effective and purposeful.


In this episode, join us as we uncover Caroline's unique approach to optimising athletic performance. Dive deep into her strategies for guiding elite athletes through high-stress situations, gaining insights into how she combines yoga, strength training, and specialised breathing techniques.


Moreover, get ready for an interactive experience as we explore box breathingвАФa powerful method to enhance focus and manage stress. Follow along during the episode to learn and practice this valuable breathing exercise firsthand.


Join us on PA CHALK UP for an enlightening conversation with Caroline, where we'll discover the intersection of movement, stress management, and athletic performance in the world of elite sports.


Caroline's Socials:

Instagram - flexbycaroline

Website - flexbycaroline.com


Manny's Socials:

Instagram - @_coachmanny_ or @pachalkup


Enquiries:

mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.title: ALI VANDENBERGHE (RD) #13
item.description:
Meet Ali VandenBerghe (RD), the powerhouse behind the nutrition program fueling the University of Washington's American Football team. As the team's dedicated nutritionist, Ali manages the crucial task of keeping all 120 players consistently fueled for their demanding daily schedules and rigorous training sessions.

In this episode, we uncover Ali's exceptional expertise and the secrets behind her successful nutrition program at the University of Washington. Through additional research, we find that Ali's success stems from her holistic approach, tailoring nutrition plans to the individual needs of each player. Her emphasis on personalized strategies, coupled with a deep understanding of the unique demands of American football, has contributed to the program's effectiveness.

Join us for an insightful conversation as we explore Ali VandenBerghe's role in optimizing the performance of the University of Washington's football team. Gain valuable insights into the world of sports nutrition and discover the keys to her program's success on PA CHALK UP. Manny's Socials:

Instagram - @pachalkup or @_coachmanny_


Enquiries:

mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

item.description:
Meet David Cowan, a seasoned strength and conditioning coach with a rich background in the field. Formerly my coach, he brings his expertise to the Scottish Rugby Union (SRU) Development programs while also managing his own Strength and Conditioning Program alongside his role at Scottish Rugby.


In this episode, we dive into Coach Cowan's multifaceted role, where he works diligently with development squads. item.title: LAURA SU #11
item.description:
Laura Su, a dedicated Strength Coach, empowers her clients through personalized one-on-one and online training. She specializes in helping beginner women build strength for everyday life and prepares them for powerlifting competitions.


A passionate powerlifting athlete herself, Laura has showcased remarkable determination by reaching the national level. Join us as we explore her journey and the invaluable insights she brings to the world of strength training.


In this episode, we uncover Laura's strategies for coaching and her own competitive experiences. She offers a unique perspective on achieving strength goals and discusses her upcoming national-level competition.


Get ready for a dynamic conversation filled with inspiration and practical advice for fitness enthusiasts, beginners, and aspiring powerlifters. Tune in to PA CHALK UP for a glimpse into the world of strength and powerlifting with Laura Su.


Get in contact with Laura:


Instagram - @littlelaurlifts

Website - www.lstraining.net/about-ls-training


Get in touch with Manny:

Instagram - @_coachmanny_ or @pachalkup

item.title: JUAN MAYO #10
item.description:
In this episode, we sit down with Juan Mayo, a dedicated Strength and Conditioning Coach hailing from the sunshine state of Florida. Currently working in the private general population sector, Juan has his sights set on a new frontier: youth development.

Juan's journey through the world of sports is nothing short of inspiring. With prior experience in Division 1 American football, he carries a wealth of knowledge and a relentless drive to propel athletes to the highest echelons of performance.

Join us as we delve into Juan's aspirations and explore his passion for cultivating young talent. Discover the unique insights and strategies he's honed along the way, as he shares his vision for shaping the future of youth development in the world of sports.

Prepare to be inspired and enlightened as we navigate the exciting landscape of athletic development with Juan Mayo. This is an episode you won't want to miss on PA CHALK UP. Juan's Socials: @jmayo_strength Manny's Socials: @_coachmanny_ or @pachalkup

item.title: SACHIN McDONNELL #9
item.description:
In this episode, we're thrilled to welcome Sachin McDonnell, a highly regarded Strength and Conditioning Coach and the proud owner of Maximum Sports Conditioning in the heart of Seattle, Washington. Sachin brings a wealth of experience to the table and is known for his innovative approach that continually pushes the boundaries of the industry.


Sachin's passion for advancing the field is evident as he discusses his commitment to hosting conferences and maintaining constant contact with fellow coaches, ensuring he stays on the cutting edge of all things new and transformative in the world of sports performance.


But that's just the beginning. Sachin's insights run deep. He delves into the often-overlooked importance of psychology in athletic development and highlights the critical value of fostering strong relationships with both parents and athletes. Moreover, Sachin provides a masterclass on the role of fascia in enhancing movement performance, shedding light on a fascinating dimension of physical training.


Drawing from his extensive experience, Sachin reveals the principles he has honed over the years, offering a treasure trove of wisdom for coaches and fitness enthusiasts alike.


Prepare to be inspired and informed as we embark on a journey into the dynamic world of strength and conditioning with Sachin McDonnell. This episode is a must-listen for anyone seeking to elevate their understanding of the industry. Join us on [Your Podcast Name] for a deep dive into the strategies and philosophies that have made Sachin a standout figure in the field.


Sachin's Socia Media:

@coachsachinmcdonnell / @maxsc_gym / @paladinhhpofficial


Manny's Social Media:

@_coachmanny_ / @pachalkup


For any Enquiries:

mannysilveira@primitiveathletix.com

Prepare to be inspired and informed as we embark on a journey into the dynamic world of strength and conditioning with Sachin McDonnell. This episode is a must-listen for anyone seeking to elevate their understanding of the industry. Join us on [Your Podcast Name] for a deep dive into the strategies and philosophies that have made Sachin a standout figure in the field.

item.title: COLIN DIXON #8
item.description:
Colin Dixon, an accomplished American Football Coach and Assistant Recruiter at Stephen F. Austin State University. In this enlightening conversation, Colin provides a unique window into his multifaceted role in the world of sports.


Colin delves deep into his daily responsibilities as a coach and recruiter, shedding light on the intricacies of managing these demanding positions. Learn how he effectively balances these roles to optimise player development and recruitment at Stephen F. Austin State University.


But that's not all. Colin goes a step further to explore the vital topic of team culture. Discover the approach and philosophies that Stephen F. Austin State University employs in cultivating a winning culture and fostering athletic development.


Moreover, Colin emphasises the significance of networking and building connections within the sports industry. Hear firsthand why a robust support system is a game-changer for anyone pursuing a career in coaching and recruitment.


Join us for an engaging and informative discussion with Colin Dixon, as we uncover the strategies and insights that have made him a standout figure in the realm of American football coaching. This is an episode you won't want to miss on PA CHALK UP.

Colin's Social Media:

@cdixson2_


Manny's Social Media:

@_coachmanny_ / @pachalkup

item.title: NATHAN ALLAS #7
item.description:
Nathan Allas, an accomplished Strength and Conditioning Coach currently based at Maximum Sports Conditioning, Nathan brings a wealth of expertise to the strength realm. With a profound understanding of human biomechanics and therapy, Nathan stands out as a standout coach in his field.


In this episode, Nathan takes a deep dive into the intricate science behind strength and conditioning. He eloquently articulates the significance of prioritising fascia, as well as exploring the interconnected aspects of loaded movements. Join us as we unravel the secrets of optimising your physical performance and delve into the fascinating world of human performance.


Tune in for an enlightening conversation that promises to empower you with invaluable insights into the art and science of Strength and Conditioning. Get ready to elevate your training game with Nathan Allas on this episode of PA Chalk Up.

item.title: ISAAC AGUIRRE #6
item.description:
Isaac Aguirre, a distinguished Strength and Conditioning Coach hailing from Washington. His transformative journey commenced in his formative years, under the guidance of a remarkable S&C mentor John Piper who not only nurtured his athletic ability but also facilitated his personal development.


Today, Isaac stands as a venerable coach, serving at the helm of Division 1 Olympic sports at North Dakota State. In this riveting installment, we embark on a profound exploration of Isaac's realm of Strength and Conditioning, delving into the rich tapestry of his extensive coaching internships and professional pursuits.


Furthermore, we gain invaluable insights into the renowned 'Bison way' illuminating it's architectural blueprint for individual achievement. We also emphasize the profound significance of team camaraderie and its profound impact on performance and success.

item.title: JACK WOOLHOUSE #5
item.description:
Join us for an insightful episode featuring Jack Woolhouse, an accomplished international strength and conditioning coach hailing from England, UK. With a laser focus on the private sector of strength and conditioning coaching, Jack shares his wealth of expertise in this conversation.


In this episode, Jack takes a deep dive into the world of smart investments for strength and conditioning coaches, offering valuable insights on qualifications and strategies for business growth. Discover how giving back to your clients can be a key driver in your professional journey.


What sets Jack apart is his unwavering commitment to pushing the boundaries of his coaching abilities, a driving force behind his remarkable success.

item.title: NATALIE McCALLUM #4
item.description:
Natalie McCallum, a distinguished Udub intern, brings forth a remarkable narrative steeped in industry experience. In the midst of her journey, she grapples with a condition that occasionally presents challenges to her coaching prowess, a topic she eloquently explores in this podcast. Natalie's coaching finesse is exemplified by her impeccable memory for names, a hallmark of her excellence in the field.


Moreover, she graciously provides us with profound insights into the unique experiences and perspectives of being a woman in a predominantly male-dominated professional sphere. Join us as we delve into Natalie's captivating narrative, marked by resilience, expertise, and a trailblasing spirit.


Natalies Socials:

@coachnataliemccallum


Manny's Socials:

@_coachmanny_ or @pachalkup

item.title: RYAN CROSON #3
item.description:
In this week's exhilarating installment of PA Chalk Up, we are privileged to be joined by none other than Ryan Croson, a former Division 1 track athlete who has seamlessly transitioned into the realm of Strength and Conditioning (S&C) coaching. Ryan's journey intertwines with our very own Manny, as their paths converged during an intensive internship at the prestigious University of Washington Football Team.


During this transformative experience, Ryan took Manny under his wing, introducing him to the heart-pounding environment of his local gym, Curtis Clay Training. Little did they know that this chance encounter would ignite a fervent exploration into the intricate world of S&C, ultimately leading them toward their vital roles within a team poised for monumental success.


In the wake of their shared epiphany, Ryan has since established himself as an integral part of Udub, where he diligently dedicates his time and expertise to elevate athletic performance. Furthermore, he has returned to his alma mater, Bothell High School, as a track coach, fostering the next generation of athletes.


However, Ryan's ambitions don't stop there. With an unwavering commitment to pushing the boundaries of excellence, he aspires to seamlessly integrate the cutting-edge realm of sports science into the track and field arena, bringing innovation and precision to every stride.


Tune in to this electrifying episode as we unravel Ryan Croson's remarkable journey from Division 1 athlete to an S&C luminary with a vision to reshape the future of sports performance!

Ryan's Socials: @ryancroson


For any enquiries:

mannysilviera@primitiveathletix.com Teambuildr is NOT a sponcer of the podcast - they simply did a nice gesture so I thought I would return the favour by giving them a shout out.

item.title: BRANDON CHU #1
item.description:
Join us in this episode as we explore the remarkable journey of Brandon Chu, a dear friend and colleague of Manny's. Their paths first crossed during a transformative summer internship at the prestigious University of Washington in 2022. United by their passion for FOOD and an unyielding commitment to self-improvement, their connection blossomed into a profound and mutually beneficial friendship.


Brandon Chu has an impressive career trajectory, having previously served as an Intern Strength and Conditioning Coach at both Springfield College and the University of Health and Performance. Today, he continues to excel in the public sector as a distinguished Coach for The LIV Method, headquartered in the vibrant city of New York.


Discover the insights, experiences, and wisdom that have shaped Brandon's journey, and gain valuable perspectives on the world of strength and conditioning in this captivating episode.


If you found this episode engaging and insightful, don't forget to show your support by liking and subscribing to our podcast!


Brandons Socials:

@justbchu


Mannys Socials:

@_coachmanny_ or @pachalkup


For any enquiries:

mannysilviera@primitiveathletix.com
